ARBITRATOR MARTE JOSEPH BASSI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-06-2012 THROUGH OCT-04-2012.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JERAD LEONG IS AWARDED $8,490.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT LIND AND PLAINTIFF DEANNA WONG IS AWARDED $8,570.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT LIND. INTERVENER TAKES NOTHING BY WAY OF ITS COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION AND PLAINTIFFS ARE AWARDED THEIR STATUTORY COSTS AGAINST DEFENDANT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED OCT-03-2012.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. CROSS COMPLAINANT TAKES NOTHING BY WAY OF CROSS-COMPLAINT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED OCT-03-2012.
